comments.body:
Hello American Natural Premium,

Good Day!

To answer your queries -
1. Order 12081 is the latest order imported in the plugin on your store. Could you please let us know if you have any other recent order which is not imported in the plugin? If so, please share the status of the order in WooCommerce.
2. When import is initiated, the import takes some time and the Refresh will appear at every new update. Please wait for some time before clicking on Refresh.


For the order import case, to check further, please share WP Admin Access (URL, Username and Password) for your store as well.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello American Natural Premium,
 
Good Day!
 
To answer your queries - 
  1. Order 12081 is the latest order imported in the plugin on your store. Could you please let us know if you have any other recent order which is not imported in the plugin? If so, please share the status of the order in WooCommerce.
  2. When import is initiated, the import takes some time and the Refresh will appear at every new update. Please wait for some time before clicking on Refresh.
 
For the order import case, to check further, please share WP Admin Access (URL, Username and Password) for your store as well.
 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello American Natural Premium,

Thank you for the access.

I have checked the cases on your store and the plugin loaded without any difficulty for us. There might have been some temporary case maybe due to network unavailability where the plugin did not load.

For the order import failures, I checked and could observe that some webhooks were disabled for the plugin. I have refreshed all the webhooks for the plugin on your store and made sure all the recent orders in Processing Status in WooCommerce are imported in the plugin (12083 and 12084).

Please monitor the case with new orders and let us know if the orders do not import automatically.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello American Natural Premium,
 
Thank you for the access.
 
I have checked the cases on your store and the plugin loaded without any difficulty for us. There might have been some temporary case maybe due to network unavailability where the plugin did not load.
 
For the order import failures, I checked and could observe that some webhooks were disabled for the plugin. I have refreshed all the webhooks for the plugin on your store and made sure all the recent orders in Processing Status in WooCommerce are imported in the plugin (12083 and 12084).
 
Please monitor the case with new orders and let us know if the orders do not import automatically.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
**Need Assistance from L3 Team**

**Case:** Orders not importing into WSS automatically

**Details:**
The customer is reporting that WooCommerce processing orders are not importing automatically into the WSS plugin. This issue has been reported multiple times.

For reference, when the customer clicks on Import Orders, all processing orders are imported successfully without any issues.

Could you please investigate why orders are not importing into WSS automatically?

**What we have checked:**

- WP JSON: Working fine
- Webhooks sync: Working fine, no duplicates found
- Products: Successfully imported
- Order status: Processing


**Expected Behavior:**
WooCommerce orders should automatically import into the plugin without requiring any manual action.

**Store Details:**

- Store URL: https://americannaturalpremium.com/
- Account ID: 3cc202c0-d7c3-49bd-9a3d-69f240c68185


**WP Admin Details:**

- URL: https://americannaturalpremium.com/wp-admin
- Username: dev
- Password: n)YAtwB(Eu(763WmeRhuvFGf

Hello Jason,

Today, we activated logs on the plugin to monitor the order import behavior. I can see that a few orders placed after order #12104 were not imported. We will review the logs further and work on providing a fix for this case. We will get back to you with an update by Monday.

In the meantime, you can proceed with processing the orders that have already been imported.

Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
We checked the issue and found that the webhook was associated with a user account that may not have had the required permissions to access or update WooCommerce orders.
Because of this, the order update request was being blocked by the store and returning the following authorization error:

    woocommerce_rest_cannot_view401 Unauthorized

To resolve this, we recommend recreating the webhook using an Administrator account or updating the webhook owner permissions appropriately.
The existing webhook has already been deleted from WooCommerce.
Please let us know once the new webhook is created, and we will help verify the functionality from our side as well.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/ITQUhqdBEJOuuZsRbts7wPSNl/?name=image.png)

-[Athul]
comments.html_body:
We checked the issue and found that the webhook was associated with a user account that may not have had the required permissions to access or update WooCommerce orders.
Because of this, the order update request was being blocked by the store and returning the following authorization error:
woocommerce_rest_cannot_view
401 Unauthorized
To resolve this, we recommend recreating the webhook using an Administrator account or updating the webhook owner permissions appropriately.
The existing webhook has already been deleted from WooCommerce.
Please let us know once the new webhook is created, and we will help verify the functionality from our side as well.
 

 
-[Athul]

**Need assistance from L3 team:**
Our response to the customer (as per dev team internal notes):

> To resolve this, we recommend recreating the webhook using an Administrator account or updating the webhook owner permissions appropriately.


Could you please help us understand the exact steps to recreate the webhook or update webhook owner permissions in WooCommerce?

Since we have admin access to the store, are we allowed to create or modify the webhook from our end? Or is this strictly required to be done by the customer?

If it needs to be done from the customer side, could you please share the exact step-by-step guide so we can pass it on to them?

Thanks in advance.

comments.body:
Hello Jason,

Thank you for your patience.

We have cleared all the webhooks from our end on your store.

Please login to your WooCommerce Dashboard using Admin Login details and perform a plugin ReSync.

We have added a video which you can follow to perform the ReSync. Once Resynced, please initiate the order import manually in the plugin once. Post this, the orders should be imported automatically.

Please try and keep us informed if the order import case happens again.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
